question: How many tens are in the number 14?
hints: Teen numbers all have 1 ten and some extra ones.
solution: 14 has 1 ten. All teen numbers (11-19) have exactly 1 ten.

question: What is 10 and 3 more?
solution: 10 and 3 more is 13. We write it as 13: one ten and three ones.

question: Break apart 16: it is 10 and how many more?
hints: 16 = 10 + ___. What number do you add to 10 to get 16?

question: Which teen number is 10 and 9 more?
solution: 10 and 9 more is 19. 19 is the biggest teen number.

question: You have 10 red blocks and 7 blue blocks. How many blocks do you have in all? Write the teen number.
hints: 10 blocks plus some more blocks makes a teen number.
solution: 10 + 7 = 17. You have 17 blocks. That is 1 ten and 7 ones.
